title: Global Payments Climbs After Goldman Sachs Upgrade
text: Global Payments, Inc. (NYSE: GPN) shares are moving after Goldman Sachs upgraded the fintech firm's rating from Neutral to BUY. Goldman analyst Will Nance also assigned a $127 price target, noting that the recent selloff has presented a new buying opportunity.

title: Here's Why You Should Retain Global Payments (GPN) Stock for Now
text: Global Payments' (GPN) inorganic growth initiatives, financial flexibility and growing payments volume poise it well for growth.

title: My Dividend Growth Portfolio March Update: Still Accumulating Cash
text: The portfolio remains at record high levels of cash holdings, which is fine for the first time in a long time, cash is providing a decent return. Income growth is projected at 7.9% for the year, up from last month. This was primarily due to including an estimated return on cash.

title: The 7 Most Undervalued Stocks to Buy in April 2023
text: The stock market had a strong first quarter, with many companies posting big gains. This was a welcome turn of events after a difficult 2022 for investors.

title: Newly Independent Pavilion Payments Announces Closing of Previously Announced Transaction
text: LAS VEGAS--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Pavilion Payments (“Pavilion” or the “Company”) has closed its previously announced transaction with Global Payments Inc. (NYSE: GPN) alongside Parthenon Capital (“Parthenon”), a leading growth-focused private equity firm. Formerly known as Global Payments Gaming Solutions, Pavilion Payments is the leading omni-channel payments provider exclusively serving the gaming industry.

title: GLOBAL PAYMENTS SHAREHOLDER ACTION NOTICE: Securities Litigation Partner James (Josh) Wilson Encourages Investors Who Suffered Losses Exceeding $100,000 In Global Payments To Contact Him Directly To Discuss Their Options
text: NEW YORK , April 1, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- PR Newswire / Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, a leading national securities law firm, is investigating potential claims against Global Payments, Inc. ("Global Payments" or the "Company") (NYSE: GPN) and reminds investors of the April 7, 2023 deadline to seek the role of lead plaintiff in a federal securities class action that has been filed against the Company. If you suffered losses exceeding $100,000 investing in Global Payments stock or options between October 31, 2019 and October 18, 2022 and would like to discuss your legal rights, call Faruqi & Faruqi partner Josh Wilson directly at 877-247-4292 or 212-983-9330  (Ext.
